_doc: C2M2 file table -> one Dataset (additionalType File) per row, linking back to source data. Reproduces the v0.1 _file_entities row-explosion. 'generated: true' places these in the conversion Computation.generated (they are the source-data bridge nodes the conversion emits).

constants.name: {eff_filename}
constants.author: {author}
constants.description: Source data file '{eff_filename}', an individual record exploded from the C2M2 file table (id_namespace={id_namespace}, local_id={eff_local_id}). Its contentUrl links back to the source data. This is the source-data bridge from C2M2 metadata to actual data.

fields._note: External persistent identifier (DOI/Cellosaurus/n2t ARK). Preserved here; when it is not an ARK the @id is a minted crate ARK instead (id.strategy persistent_ark_or_mint).
